reason: Quality gate commands and backend layer expectations.
Verify new reconcile logic stays in the correct layer and does not leak adapter types.
Verify coordinator/adapter behavior against private stream, REST retry, and error-state contracts.
Verify reconcile failures publish and wrap errors consistently with transport/venue detail contracts.
Verify order cache synchronization and command semantics remain stable.
Verify any public option/type changes remain type-safe.
Validate tests/docs reflect Binance REST reconcile request weights and lifecycle semantics.
